---
name: Template proposal
about: Propose a new template form or substantial template adaptation
title: "[Template] "
labels: template
assignees: ""
---

## Proposed use case

Describe the repository shape or workflow pressure that the current templates do
not handle well.

## Why existing templates are insufficient

Explain why `templates/standard/genesis.md`, `templates/complex/genesis.md`, or
the snippets cannot cover the case with controlled adaptation.

## Proposed template shape

List the sections you believe are needed and how they differ from the current
template family.

## Relationship to the spec

State whether this proposal preserves the current spec or requires a spec change.

## Evidence

Link the proposal to a real class of repositories, not a hypothetical taste
preference.

## Risks

Explain how this proposal avoids fragmenting the framework into unrelated styles.
